arts.ttl: Former Leeds United and Wolves defender makes transfer vow after sealing Scottish switch
arts.sum: The seasoned 35-year-old defender, with a career that spans from Queen’s Park to international appearances for Scotland, and clubs like Dundee United, Konyaspor, Wolves, Leeds United, Blackburn, and most recently Lech Poznan in Poland, is set to bring his wealth of experience to the Perth team now managed by Simo Valakari. He concluded with optimism about the team's prospects under Valakari's guidance: "There is definitely a lot of quality in the squad and I think when we start to work with the new manager and his philosophy, the only way is up really."

arts.ttl: 'I would not be happy' Farke pulls Leeds United curtain back on Bamford's status
arts.sum: Missed major parts of pre-season and when he came back he had more slight issues. A fully-fit Bamford would have had us in the PL last season.

arts.ttl: Leeds post TikTok poking fun at Sheff Utd’s O’Hare
arts.sum: Three Yorkshire derbies in the Championship this season for Leeds United have all yielded 2-0 wins, the latest coming against Sheffield United on Friday night. Leeds came into the weekend as the team to beat in the Championship, according to Blades boss Chris Wilder, and his praise of the club inherently put some pressure on the Whites to get the right result.

He shared with Glen Kamara the duties of building the game in the centre of the pitch of Daniel Farke’s team and did a decent job despite the injury that prevented him from playing all the matches of the season. On average, he makes 3.2 successful exits per match, which makes the work of defenders much easier and allows the team to play with a high defensive line.

arts.ttl: Watford rocked by fresh injury setback before Leeds United test
arts.sum: “The early signs for Angelo are not great and it looks like he’s had a recurrence of the hamstring issue he suffered at the end of the Middlesbrough game,” said head coach Tom Cleverley . Cleverley has confirmed Dan Bachmann has passed a fitness test, with the Austrian international expected to start in between the sticks at Elland Road tomorrow night.

arts.ttl: Leeds close to free agent signing, could be Guilavogui
arts.sum: In terms of identities of that free agent, the most likely signing Leeds are going to make now is Frenchman Josuha Guilavogui. Leeds are looking up and aiming to cement their place in the automatic promotion slots in the coming weeks after beating Sheffield United comprehensively on Friday night.

arts.ttl: Leeds United edge closer to transfer breakthrough to address short-term priority
arts.sum: Third-placed Leeds United are edging closer to bringing in a free agent, manager Daniel Farke has revealed. By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen.

arts.ttl: Leeds United provide major Wilfried Gnonto injury update ahead of Watford clash
arts.sum: Farke said: “We always try to be ourselves on the pitch and to be the protagonist but it’s also it’s important to be prepared for different scenarios. Leeds United have no new injury worries as they put the finishing touches to their preparations for tomorrow's clash with Watford.
